name: Oyster Crackers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon baking soda dissolved in hot water
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the butter into the flour, or more finely, cut it up with a knife or chopper as you do in pastry; add the salt, milk, and baking soda, mixing well.
2. Work into a ball, place on a floured board, and roll with a rolling pin for half an hour, turning and shifting the mass often.
3. Roll into an even sheet, no more than 1/4 inch thick, prick deeply with a fork, and bake in a moderate oven until hard.
4. Hang up in a muslin bag in the kitchen for 2 days to dry.
